entry.title: Ahmed intros Baby Rogers + QB Countdown recap | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 884) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
“My boyfriend’s back and he’s better than ever…” Chris and Ahmed reunite to recap the Simms QB Countdown and answer some #AskMeAnything questions. Who would Chris rather have right now, Drake London or Nico Collins? But first, we welcome the newest member of the Unbuttoned family…Cameron Rogers! #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) We proudly present…Cameron Rogers!!! Who already has his dad’s style. (6:20) News: Nick Herbig gets big contract (11:10) Micah Parsons will miss the start of the season (17:25) Drake London gets 4-year extension (23:25) Rome Odunze’s eye-opening comments on his foot (25:10) Russell Wilson retires (32:25) QB Countdown: Which Draft Class quartet would Chris take for the future? (37:50) Homies react to Chris’ Top 10 (38:55) QB #7 Justin Herbert…is he given too many excuses? (42:05) QB #6 Caleb Williams…could he be #1 next year? (47:40) QB #5 Matthew Stafford…should he have been Top 4? (50:20) QB #4 Patrick Mahomes…do his accomplishments make him overrated or underrated? (53:10) QB #3 Lamar Jackson & #2 Joe Burrow…what separates them? (55:15) QB #1 Josh Allen…is he truly “unstoppable?” (1:03:35) #AskMeAnything: Myles Garrett MVP? Super Kicker? And when is Chris gonna drop another song?

entry.title: Myles Garrett to LA + Simms QB Countdown: Top 4 | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 883) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
The Simms 2026 QB Countdown concludes with THE FINAL FOUR! Where does Chris rank Patrick, Josh, Joe, and Lamar? But first, Simms & Stugotz dive into the blockbuster Myles Garrett & A.J. Brown trades…is an Aaron Donald return next? #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Chris recaps his visit with “old soul” Caleb Williams (7:10) News: Myles Garrett blockbuster trade to Rams (20:10) Could Aaron Donald return? (26:05) A.J. Brown finally lands with Patriots (37:35) Simms QB Countdown: It’s the Big Four once again (40:50) QB #4 Patrick Mahomes (45:45) QB #3 Lamar Jackson (49:25) QB #2 Joe Burrow (54:05) QB #1 Josh Allen (1:03:05) Caleb Williams is the new Madden cover

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #10-8 + A.J. Brown trade? | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 881) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Connor is out, so Simms calls in his (self-proclaimed?) podcast mentor Stugotz to steer the ship. The guys recount how the QB Countdown started 8 years ago, and then reveal 3 more QBs in this year’s Countdown. Plus, the A.J. Brown trade clock officially starts ticking, and will the 2024 QB class go down as the best ever? #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) We get a full history of the birth of the Simms QB Countdown (7:00) Which Simms QB Countdown rank has gotten the most blowback? (17:40) News: A.J. Brown trade watch (20:10) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to the ranking of Sam Darnold, Jared Goff, Trevor Lawrence, & Dak Prescott (29:50) QB #10 Baker Mayfield (38:25) Simms has THREE QBs from the 2024 Draft in his Top 9…could it be the greatest QB class ever? (45:30) QB #9 Jayden Daniels (57:35) QB #8 Drake Maye NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #14-11; J.J. McCarthy is mad | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 880) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
It’s Connor’s LAST episode before he enters fatherhood, and he’s going out in style. Or “in vogue?” Simms reveals 4 more names in his QB Countdown…who lands JUST outside his Top 10? Plus, J.J. McCarthy does not seem happy to be in a QB competition, and Chris tells a Madonna story. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Papa Connor is “going out with a bang!” (5:15) Homies comments: One of them launches a Chris story about meeting Madonna when he was WAY too young (14:20) News: A.J. Brown isn’t at OTAs, and Jalen Hurts had an interesting quote about it (17:45) J.J. McCarthy weighs in on the Vikings QB competition (25:25) Daniel Jones is practicing (27:50) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Brock Purdy, Bo Nix, & Jordan Love (38:10) QB #14 Sam Darnold (46:20) DraftKings NFC West odds (53:50) QB #13 Jared Goff (59:30) QB #12 Trevor Lawrence (1:04:20) QB #11 Dak Prescott

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #18-15 + Nico or CeeDee? | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 879) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
The QB Countdown continues with 4 more names on Chris’ list, including 2 passers recovering from an injury. Plus, the guys react to Nico Collins’ new deal and discuss how he compares to the highest-paid receivers in the NFL. But first, the homies discovered a new Simmsism.. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Chris says what’s up to Connor…and isn’t faking it (2:55) The homies weigh in on our Jaxson Dart conversation (8:05) News: Bears QB Coach has some strong words for Caleb Williams (11:05) Nico Collins gets revised contract from Texans (17:40) Derwin James gets extension from Chargers (22:20) Lamar Jackson back at OTAs (23:25) Patrick Mahomes throwing at OTAs after ACL repair (24:45) DraftKings: Comeback Player of the Year odds (27:50) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Malik Willis, Jalen Hurts, Tyler Shough, & short QBs (38:40) QB #18 Daniel Jones (46:15) QB #17 Brock Purdy (56:45) QB #16 Bo Nix (1:03:30) QB #15 Jordan Love

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #24-19: Make or Break | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 878) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
The QB Countdown enters the Top 20, with some passers facing a make-or-break season. Jaxson Dart’s “missteps” made some unwanted headlines for the Giants this weekend. But first, Connor pays $50 to be Chris’ friend again. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Connor makes up for his terrible friend mistake (6:45) Knicks: Where were Chris & Connor in 1999? (11:50) Homie comments: Top 40 birds, Old school arms, and John Elway vs Aaron Rodgers (20:40) News: Jaxson Dart’s “misstep” and what it means for the Giants locker room (33:35) Giants extend GM Joe Schoen’s contract (35:40) Rams & Matthew Stafford agree to 1-year extension (42:00) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Tyler Shough, Aaron Rodgers, & Jameis Winston (46:45) QB #24 Geno Smith (49:55) QB #23 Cam Ward (53:10) QB #22 Jaxson Dart (58:20) QB #21 Jalen Hurts (1:02:30) DraftKings: NFC East odds (1:04:50) QB #20 C.J. entry.title: QB Countdown kicks off; Steelers sign Rodgers | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 874) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
It’s that time of year againnnnnnnnn…..SIMMS QB COUNTDOWN TIME! We kick off the journey to #1 with a couple rookie passers. Plus, you’ll see where Deshaun Watson & Shedeur Sanders rank for Chris. But first, Aaron Rodgers (finally) signs with the Steelers, and the guys break down the Chargers quietly brutal schedule.. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned

entry.title: 2026 Schedule Release: Hot & Cold Starts | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 873) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Connor & Chris break down the 2026 Schedule Release…which teams made Simms say HOLY SHIT BATMAN with tough schedules??? Which teams have favorable starts?? And DAMN are the primetime and holiday schedules good. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) 2026 Schedule Release: What’s the first thing Simms looks for? (4:45) Seahawks: manageable schedule for the champs (11:05) Rams: holy $h!t hard start, holy $h!t hard finish (15:10) 49ers: soft return after Australia (17:40) Eagles: could Philly be a dumpster fire? (22:50) Bears: first time they’ll have a target on their back (26:50) Patriots: favorable schedule for a team that was just in the Super Bowl (30:10) Broncos: they hit the Holy Sh!t category, one of the toughest starts of any team (33:25) Chiefs: early BYE could be perfect timing (38:15) Bills: two stretches of 4 of 5 on the road will be tricky (43:15) DraftKings: New Head Coaches Week 1 Odds (45:10) Cardinals: Arizona could start 0-13 (48:10) Lions: should be 4-1 entering BYE week (49:55) Cowboys: early travel could get tricky despite them being better (51:30) Commanders: opening stretch is brutal (52:45) Ravens: early schedule sets up really nice for them (54:05) Jets: still not easy, but better than it’s been (56:55) Colts: could be 0-3 to start, and they need to make it happen this year (58:20) Jaguars: did Trevor Lawrence really cut his hair? (1:02:25) Primetime schedules are all loaded (1:05:15) Thanksgiving Schedule looks like a playoff schedule (1:08:55) Christmas Day Schedule stacked as well NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. entry.title: EXTENDED BEST-OF EPISODE: Favorite show moments and guests | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) Jay (@croucherJD) and Connor (@ConnorJRogers) look back on the most outstanding moments over the last four years of the Fantasy Football Happy and are joined by a bevy of show contributors both in front and behind the scenes, including Pat Daugherty (@RotoPat), Denny Carter (@CDCarter13), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose). They also spend a little extra time in the discord with the Regulars answering questions and continuing long-standing show themes. #NFL #NBCSports #happyhour
Chapters: (2:30) – Matthew gives an update on the show (4:40) – Best moments from the last four years of the show (16:45) – RotoPat and Denny Carter join the show (27:30) – Penn State Blake and Big Show drop by (36:35) – Best of Fantasy Football Pregame (42:50) – Backup Producer Pete stops by the set (45:10) – The Regulars share their shoutouts (48:20) – Lawrence Jackson joins the guys in studio (52:10) – Best of Super Bowl Radio Row guests (58:10) – Extended discord conversations with the Regulars
» Subscribe to NBC Sports: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports?sub_confirmation=1 » Watch SNF on Peacock: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Get more NFL news on NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com/nfl

Sunday Night is Football Night on NBC as SNF continues to be America’s #1 Primetime show. NBC is also home to two NFL playoff games each season – one Wild Card Playoff game and one Divisional Playoff game – and offers full streaming rights on NBCSports.com and the NBC Sports App.
Emmy Award winners Cris Collinsworth and Mike Tirico follow all the action from the booth, along with Melissa Stark from the field.

entry.title: 2026 Rookie Positional Rankings: Jeremiyah Love, Price, Tate | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) details his time at the Kentucky Derby which included a strange interaction at dinner to Jay (@croucherJD) and Connor (@ConnorJRogers), then the trio dive into where Matthew is placing rookies in his positional rankings this season. Jeremiyah Love, Jordyn Tyson, and Fernando Mendoza are among the players discussed. The crew also highlights A.J. Brown, Jaxson Dart and other veteran movers in the rankings along the way and wrap up the show with their favorite bets to win Super Bowl LXI. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) - Welcome (1:45) – Matthew recaps his time betting Churchill Downs and shares an unusual story going out to dinner (7:30) – Rookie RB Rankings: Jeremiyah Love (RB11), Jadarian Price (RB27) (18:45) – Rookie WR Rankings: Carnell Tate (WR25), Jordyn Tyson (WR32), Makai Lemon (WR44), KC Concepcion (WR46), Omar Cooper Jr. (WR55) + Germie Bernard, Antonio Williams intrigue (31:40) – Notable Veteran WR Movers: A.J. Brown (WR11), DeVonta Smith (WR14), Terry McLaurin (WR22) (37:20) – Jay reveals why he is feverishly rooting for Arsenal to win the Premier League (40:50) – Rookie QB Rankings: Fernando Mendoza (QB28) + Jaxson Dart (QB9), Tyler Shough (QB17) among top veteran movers (44:40) – Rookie TE Rankings: Kenyon Sadiq (TE20) + Mark Andrews (TE12), Dallas Goedert (TE13) headline veteran shifts (50:05) – Last Call: Way too early Super Bowl LXI Champion bets

entry.title: Sophomore Jumps + Shedeur vs Deshaun | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 869) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Chris is back from London…which celebrities did he meet in the swanky Arsenal suites? So will Travis Hunter play both ways again after all? Plus, Simms has some hard truths for the Shedeur Sanders fans, and he and Connor pick the 2nd-year players most likely to have a Sophomore Jump. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
Chapters: (0:00) “I feel like I’m detoxing at a rate I’ve never experienced before” (5:10) Simms is back from London, and has a slideshow! (18:40) Connor has lost the mustache (28:55) Jaguars GM says Travis Hunter “is set to play both sides of the ball” (42:30) Deshaun Watson or Shedeur Sanders as Browns QB1? (47:05) Emeka Egbuka on post-Mike Evans Buccaneers (52:40) DraftKings 2026 Receiving Over/Unders for 2nd-Year Players (53:30) Sophomore Jumps: Which 2nd-Year Players will Take the Leap this Year?

entry.title: Simms goes to London + 2026 Rookie Predictions | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 868) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Welcome from London! Chris is across the pond enjoying his time learning Arsenal chants & drinking outside pubs, while Connor is at home…trying to grow something on his face? The guys do some Rookie Predictions and try to find this year’s Tyler Shough, Tetairoa McMillan, and more. Then, they go through some NFL news on Patrick Mahomes & Fernando Mendoza, before critiquing Malik Wills’ viral first pitch at a Marlins game. Plus, we take an impromptu poll of which Simms impression is better: Patrick Mahomes or Bane? #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
Chapters: (0:00) “What do you have growing on your face?” (7:10) Chris learned an Arsenal chant (14:05) RIP Yankees legend John Sterling (16:25) 2026 Rookie Predictions: This year’s Cam Ward? Raiders QB Fernando Mendoza (20:35) This year’s Tyler Shough? Cardinals QB Carson Beck (24:20) This year’s TreVeyon Henderson? Cardinals RB Jeremiyah Love & Seahawks RB Jadarian Price (27:25) This year’s Quinshon Judkins? Commanders RB Kaytron Allen & Broncos RB Jonah Coleman (30:00) This year’s Cam Skattebo? Chargers WR Brenen Thompson & Buccaneers DB Keionte Scott (32:45) This year’s Tetairoa McMillan? Titans WR Carnell Tate, Saints WR Jordyn Tyson, Commanders WR Antonio Williams (37:05) This year’s Luther Burden III? Panthers WR Chris Brazzell II & Dolphins WR Chris Bell (39:40) This year’s Grey Zabel? Texans OL Keylan Rutledge & Ravens OL Vega Ioane (41:00) This year’s James Pearce Jr? Jets DE David Bailey, LB Malachi Lawrence, 49ers DL Romello Height (44:00) This year’s Abdul Carter? Chiefs DE R Mason Thomas, Ravens DE Zion Young, Patriots LB Gabe Jacas (47:15) This year’s Carson Schwesinger? Titans LB Anthony Hill Jr, Commanders LB Sonny Styles, Vikings LB Jake Golday (50:30) This year’s Nick Emmanwori? Cowboys S Caleb Downs & Browns S Emmanuel McNeil-Warren (54:10) Andy Reid says QB Patrick Mahomes is in “good position” to participate in OTAs (58:05) Fernando Mendoza learning to play from under center (1:02:30) Texans agree to 3-year extension with LB Azeez Al-Shaair (1:03:45) Why did the Lions decline Jack Campbell’s 5th-year option? (1:07:45) Surprise poll! Which Simms impression is better: Bane or Patrick Mahomes? (1:11:15) Malik Willis goes viral…why are QBs bad at throwing a baseball?

entry.title: Post NFL Draft Love/Hate live from Churchill Downs | Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Live from Churchill Downs, Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Lawrence (@LordDontLose) and Drew Dinsick (@whale_capper) discuss Matthew’s Love/Hate list following the NFL Draft, highlighting Jalen Hurts, Cam Skattebo, Jadarian Price, DeVonta Smith, and Jordyn Tyson among others. Steve Kornacki (@SteveKornacki) also stops by to highlight favorites and long shot wagers he’s making not only for the Kentucky Derby, but also Friday’s Kentucky Oaks. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) - Welcome (4:00) – QB Love/Hate: Tyler Shough, Jalen Hurts, Cam Ward, Geno Smith, Ty Simpson, Carson Beck, Malik Willis (16:10) – RB Love/Hate: Chase Brown, Cam Skattebo, Bhayshul Tuten, Jadarian Price, Javonte Williams, Quinshon Judkins, Rachaad White, Jacory Croskey-Merritt, Tony Pollard, Nicholas Singleton, James Conner, Tyler Allgeier, RJ Harvey (31:45) – WR + TE Love/Hate: Rashee Rice, DeVonta Smith, Jordyn Tyson, Brock Bowers, Carnell Tate, Josh Downs, Tre Tucker, Germie Bernard, Antonio Williams, De’Zaun Stribling, Calvin Ridley, Rashod Bateman, Harold Fannin (45:05) – Kentucky Derby Preview: Favorites, long shots and best bets

entry.title: Simms 2026 Mock Draft; Dexter Lawrence traded | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 861) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Chris has a special gift for this year’s 4/20 celebrations: his first (and only) 2026 Mock Draft! How did the blockbuster Dexter Lawrence trade shake up the Top 10? The Patriots make a pick…for a player they won’t even keep? But first, Simms tells a story that gives the homies “2nd-hand embarrassment.” #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
Chapters: (0:00) “It’s my cannabis outfit!” (4:15) “This is one of the most embarrassing stories of my life” (8:45) NEWS: Bengals trade 10th overall pick to Giants for Dexter Lawrence (25:15) Simms 2026 Mock Draft: “This shit is hard!” (27:15) #1 Raiders (28:15) #2 Jets (30:35) #3 Cardinals (32:55) #4 Titans (35:20) #5 Commanders (trade w/ NYG) (36:45) #6 Browns (38:00) #7 Giants (trade w/ WAS) (40:00) #8 Saints (42:35) #9 Chiefs (45:05) #10 Giants (47:00) #11 Buccaneers (trade w/ MIA) (48:20) #12 Cowboys (49:30) #13 Jets (trade w/ LAR) (53:05) #14 Ravens (55:15) #15 Dolphins (trade w/ TB) (56:20) #16 Rams (trade w/ NYJ) (1:01:50) #17 Lions (1:03:40) #18 Vikings (1:06:20) #19 Panthers (1:07:25) #20 Cowboys (1:08:55) #21 Browns (trade w/ PIT) (1:10:25) #22 Bears (trade w/ LAC) (1:11:25) #23 Eagles (1:12:45) #24 Steelers (trade w/ CLE) (1:15:00) #25 Chargers (trade w/ CHI) (1:16:30) #26 Bills (1:17:35) #27 49ers (1:18:45) #28 Texans (1:21:10) #29 Chiefs (1:23:00) #30 Dolphins (1:23:50) #31 Patriots (to then trade to Eagles?) (1:26:00) #32 Seahawks

entry.title: Way Too Early WR and TE Rankings for 2026 | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) updates Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose) on his recent vacation and the guys explain why Connor drinks free before dialing into Matthew’s way too early rankings for WRs and TEs in 2026. Justin Jefferson, Zay Flowers, and Ladd McConkey headlined the WR discussions while Colston Loveland, Tucker Kraft, and George Kittle are featured among TEs. To wrap up the show, the crew unveils their favorite bets for first and second WR to be drafted next week. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL

entry.title: Top 10 Rookie Superflex Rankings | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
After revealing Matthew’s whereabouts, Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose) jump into Connor’s Rookie Superflex rankings for 2026, beginning with Jeremiyah Love, Jordyn Tyson, and Fernando Mendoza. The trio also discusses Omar Cooper Jr., Makai Lemon, Jadarian Price, and Kenyon Sadiq among others before highlighting Jauan Jenning and Stefon Diggs headlining the best remaining players in free agency. The show concludes with the crew’s favorite prop bets on positional totals drafted in the 1st Round later this month. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) -- Hello and welcome (1:00) – Jay, Connor, and Lawrence detail why Matthew has not joined them in the studio (2:05) – Rookie Superflex Rankings #1-5: Jeremiyah Love, Jordyn Tyson, Fernando Mendoza, Carnell Tate, Omar Cooper Jr. (25:00) – Rookie Superflex Rankings #6-10: Makai Lemon, Jadarian Price, Denzel Boston, Kenyon Sadiq, Jonah Coleman (39:55) – Top Remaining Free Agents: Jauan Jennings, Stefon Diggs, Deebo Samuel, Tyreek Hill, Keenan Allen, Aaron Rodgers, David Njoku (49:35) – Last Call: Best bets for NFL Draft 1st Round positional totals

entry.title: Matthew Berry's Way Too Early QB and RB Rankings for 2026 | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose) reveal a unique drink free candidate and react to Kirk Cousins reportedly joining the Raiders before diving into Matthew’s way too early QB and RB rankings for the upcoming season. Justin Herbert, Josh Allen, Lamar Jackson, and Caleb Williams headline the QB conversation, while Bijan Robinson, Christian McCaffrey, Saquon Barkley, and Chase Brown highlight the running backs. The show wraps up with the early best bets from the crew on 2026 Offensive Player of the Year. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) -- Hello and welcome (1:10) – Matthew explains why UConn basketball drinks for free and finds another way to throw backup Producer Pete under the bus (7:20) – Rotoworld Player News: Kirk Cousins reportedly agrees to deal with Raiders (11:35) – QB Rankings: Malik Willis, Justin Herbert, Josh Allen, Lamar Jackson, Caleb Williams, Patrick Mahomes, Jaxson Dart, Matthew Stafford (31:25) – RB Rankings, Pt. 1: Bijan Robinson, Christian McCaffrey, Saquon Barkley, Chase Brown (47:30) – RB Rankins, Pt. 2: Quinshon Judkins, Kenneth Gainwell, James Conner (50:15) – Last Call: Best bets for 2026 Offensive Player of the Year » Subscribe to NBC Sports: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports?sub_confirmation=1 » Watch SNF on Peacock: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Get more NFL news on NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com/nfl

Plus, the guys react to the news of Kirk Cousins signing with the Raiders, Fernando Mendoza’s Pro Day, & new reports of the Jalen Hurts Eagles dysfunction. But first, we critique Matt LaFleur & Kyle Shanahan’s outfits at the Owners’ Meetings. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft

entry.title: Free agency Love/Hate: Ken Walker III, Mike Evans, Kyler Murray | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) explains a notable recent nomination he’s received to Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose), then the quartet dives into players on the Love/Hate list following the early wave of Free Agency. Ashton Jeanty, Kenneth Walker III, Omarion Hampton, George Pickens, Mike Evans, Kyler Murray, and Malik Willis are among the players discussed before the crew wraps up the show with their favorite bets for most regular season wins in 2026. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL #FantasyFootball
Chapters: (0:00) – Hello and welcome! (1:10) – Matthew explains why he “cut the line” securing some MLB on NBC gear at the office (8:40) – Love/Hate RBs: Ashton Jeanty, Kenneth Walker III, Omarion Hampton, Cam Skattebo, Chuba Hubbard, David Montgomerty, Bhayshul Tuten, Jacory Croskey-Merritt, Emanuel Wilson, De’Von Achane, Bucky Irving, RJ Harvey, Woody Marks (29:25) – Love/Hate WRs + TEs: George Pickens, Mike Evans, Emeka Egbuka, Chris Godwin, Marvin Harrison Jr., Michael Wilson, Garrett Wilson, DJ Moore, Rome Odunze, Luther Burden III, Coleston Loveland, Christian Watson, Josh Downs, Chig Okonkwo, DK Metcalf, Brian Thomas Jr. (41:30) – Love/Hate QBs: Kyler Murray, Malik Willis, Daniel Jones, Jacoby Brissett, Jayden Daniels, J.J. McCarthy (50:30) – Last Call: Best bets for most regular season wins in 2026

entry.title: 2026 Draft WR Rankings + JSN's big deal | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 847) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
It’s wide receiver time as Chris & Connor hit the best pass-catchers in the 2026 Draft. Simms reveals his Top 5, which starts with a guy who may not be a Round 1 pick. Plus, the guys react to Jaxon Smith-Njigba’s massive extension, and Chris explains why the Lego Legion was after him. But first, we give a shoutout to Buck Rogers. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft

entry.title: Broncos trade for Jaylen Waddle + Connor’s Top 10 Prospect Positional Rankings | Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers) and Lawrence (@LordDontLose) break down the Broncos trading for Jaylen Waddle and the Chiefs bringing in Justin Fields before highlighting free agency deals for Dallas Goedert, Rachaad White, Keaton Mitchell, and Christian Kirk. The group also dig into Connor’s 2026 draft prospect rankings, analyzing Fernando Mendoza, Jeremiyah Love, and Jordyn Tyson. Along the way they ponder how Matthew can find a better connection from his Florida home and predict who will select Jeremiyah Love.
Chapters: (0:00) - Welcome! (1:40) – Matthew explains his rooting interests in the NCAA Tournament (4:15) – Rotoworld Player News: Broncos trade for Jaylen Waddle, Chiefs acquire Justin Fields from Jets, Eagles bring back Dallas Goedert and bring in Hollywood Brown (19:10) – More News & Notes: Commanders add Rachaad White and Jerome Ford, Chargers sign Keaton Mitchell, Titans restructure Calvin Ridley’s deal, Giants sign Darnell Mooney, 49ers add Christian Kirk (28:30) – Connor’s Top 10 Rookie QBs and RBs: Fernando Mendoza, Jeremiyah Love, Jadarian Price (43:00) – Connor’s Top 10 Rookie WRs and TEs: Jordyn Tyson, Carnell Tate, Chris Bell, KC Conception, Kenyon Sadiq, Eli Stowers (49:15) – Last Call: Which team will draft Jeremiyah Love?

entry.title: Jones, Doubs headline more free agency deals + Murray to the Vikings? | Happy Hour (FULL SHOW)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) explains a tumultuous final few moments before the show to Jay (@croucherJD), and Connor (@ConnorJRogers), then the trio dive into recent free agency deals, including Daniel Jones re-signing with the Colts, J.K. Dobbins and Aaron Jones return to the Broncos and Vikings respectively, Chig Okonkwo joining the Commanders, and more. The trio also ponder if Kyler Murray will sign with the Vikings before highlighting season-long yardage props for Mike Evans, Kenneth Walker III, and David Montgomery. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) – Welcome! (2:55) – Top Free Agency Headlines: Daniel Jones re-signs with Colts, Geno Smith traded to Jets, Patriots land Romeo Doubs (23:25) – Notable RB Free Agency Deals: J.K. Dobbins returns to Broncos, Aaron Jones rejoins Vikings, Chris Rodriguez lands with Jaguars, Isiah Pacheco joins Lions (44:35) – Other Free Agency Deal: Chig Okonkwo heads to Commanders, Jalen Nailor agrees to deal with Raiders (47:45) – Top Remaining Free Agents: Kyler Murray, Jauan Jennings, Stefon Diggs, Deebo Samuel, Dallas Goedert, David Njoku (49:00) – Last Call: Betting season-long yardage props for RBs and WRs

entry.title: Free Agency Reaction: Kenneth Walker III, Travis Etienne, Mike Evans, Malik Willis | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
(0:00) – Welcome to Fantasy Football Happy Hour (1:50) – Most surprising move thus far in free agency (4:10) – Top Free Agency Moves: Kenneth Walker III lands with Chiefs, Travis Etienne agrees to deal with Saints, Mike Evans joins 49ers, Colts re-sign Alec Pierce, Michael Pittman Jr. traded to Steelers (28:40) – More Free Agency Reaction: Malik Willis agrees to deal with Dolphins, Tua Tagovailoa lands with Falcons, Wan’Dale Robinson links with Titans, Rashid Shaheed re-signs with Seahawks (44:00) – Other Notable RB Signings: Tyler Allgeier agrees to deal with Cardinals, Rico Dowdle links with Steelers, Kenneth Gainwell joins Bucs (52:25) – TE Free Agency Reaction: Travis Kelce returns to Chiefs, Isaiah Likely reportedly agrees to 3-year deal with Giants
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), and Connor (@ConnorJRogers) whip through the early free agency moves around the league, discussing Kenneth Walker to the Chiefs, Mike Evans to the 49ers, Alec Pierce re-signing with the Colts, Malik Willis to the Dolphins, and Tua Tagovailoa landing with the Falcons. Along the way they also highlight Travis Etienne, Michael Pittman Jr., Wan’Dale Robinson, Tyler Allgeier, and Isaiah Likely changing teams. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL

entry.title: Most Interesting Things Heard at the Combine + Biggest Winners from Indy | Happy Hour (FULL SHOW)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), and Connor (@ConnorJRogers) recap an eventful NFL Combine starting with some of the most interesting things Berry heard in Indianapolis, including updates on Mike Evans, Deebo Samuel and Malik Willis. The guys also go through the biggest news this week, with the latest on Kyler Murray, DJ Moore and Stefon Diggs. The groups wrap with Connor’s biggest winners from the Combine, and their best bets on Kyler Murray’s next team. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) – Welcome! (2:30) – Rotoworld Player News: Bills sending Bears a second-round pick for DJ Moore (12:15) – Most Interesting Things Heard at Combine: Carr to unretire, ARI to pursue Willis (33:30) – Most Interesting Things Heard at Combine: Evans unlikely to return to TB (37:55) - Most Interesting Things Heard at Combine: Deebo & McLaurin could be out of WSH (42:00) – Rotoworld Player News: Murray & Diggs released (49:15) – Rotoworld Player News: HOU gets Montgomery, DAL signs Williams (57:04) – Connor’s Combine Winners (01:03:41) – Last Call: Kyler Murray’s Next Team
